name: The Customer 360
image_sign_text: ONE CUSTOMER. ONE TRUTH. ONE DASHBOARD.
effect: Consolidate all customer touchpoints into a single unified profile. This card is considered complete.

clauses.name: UNIFICATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If at least three data sources are connected: The profile is considered unified.

clauses.name: IDENTITY RESOLUTION EFFECT
clauses.rule: When two records share a first name and zip code: They are considered the same person.

clauses.name: COMPLETENESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If any field is empty: It is considered a known unknown and the profile remains complete.

witness_quote: Finally, a single source of truth.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which version of the customer is the real one?
